file.content:
{
  "name": "agent-feed-production-claude",
  "version": "1.0.0",
  "description": "Production Claude instance for debugging and testing",
  "scripts": {
    "start": "claude --dangerously-skip-permissions",
    "claude": "claude --dangerously-skip-permissions",
    "init": "claude --dangerously-skip-permissions",
    "test": "jest --config tests/jest.config.js",
    "test:unit": "jest --config tests/jest.config.js tests/unit",
    "test:integration": "jest --config tests/jest.integration.config.js tests/integration",
    "test:watch": "jest --config tests/jest.config.js --watch",
    "test:coverage": "jest --config tests/jest.config.js --coverage"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "mcp-server-firecrawl": "^1.2.4",
    "socket.io-client": "^4.8.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@jest/globals": "^29.7.0",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.55.0",
    "babel-jest": "^29.7.0",
    "cross-env": "^10.0.0",
    "jest": "^29.7.0",
    "jest-html-reporters": "^3.1.7",
    "jest-junit": "^16.0.0",
    "nodemon": "^3.1.10",
    "supertest": "^7.1.4"
  },
  "main": "terminal-interface.js",
  "directories": {
    "doc": "docs",
    "test": "tests"
  },
  "keywords": [],
  "author": "",
  "license": "ISC"
}
